overzicht.staafTitel: Current per box — highest loaded phase
overzicht.geenGenerators: No generators/boxes yet. Add them via "Manage".
backup.subtitel: One file for a full restore on another instance.
backup.topologieDesc: Generators, groups, boxes, links, ratings — the existing export JSON.
backup.plattegrondLogoDesc: Uploaded floor plan image and event logo.
backup.meetdataDesc: Historical current/voltage data as CSV. Can get large — choose a period.
backup.duurHint: May take a while for measurement data over a long period.
backup.herstelSubtitel: Restore a previously made backup (zip), or add it as an edition to an archive.
backup.herstelVolledigDesc: For a fresh/empty instance — e.g. after a hardware swap at a location. Restores topology, media and measurement data, with the same edition. No new edition, a continuation.
backup.herstelToevoegenDesc: For comparing multiple years — adds only this backup's measurement data as a new edition alongside what's already there. Topology/media are left untouched.
backup.herstelNvt: Not applicable when adding an edition.
backup.herstelMeetdataAltijd: Always added — this is the whole point of this mode.
calbar.hint: Click a generator or box in the list on the right, then click the map (or the empty area, if there's no floor plan yet) to place it. Placed pins can be dragged.
calbar.armedLabel: Click the map now to place "{naam}"
blankcanvas.hint: No floor plan uploaded yet. You can place boxes freely here already — upload a floor plan later via the button above, positions stay as they are.
schema.emptyHint: No generators/boxes yet. Add them via "Manage" — the diagram is drawn automatically.
aside.detailLeeg: Select a box to see details.
detail.bypassUitleg: On overload, power goes directly to the outgoing feeder
beheer.systeeminstellingenSubtitel: Event name and edition — used for the editie/evenement tags on measurement data, and to tell different events/editions apart when restoring a backup.
beheer.instellingenHint: This briefly restarts Telegraf — a few seconds of measurements around this moment may be missed.
beheer.alertVulInstellingen: Enter an event name and edition
beheer.ratingTitle: Only fill in if this generator/group is itself metered too (native or via Shelly+CT clamp)
beheer.ledenRatingTitle: Only fill in if this member is itself metered too (its own Shelly+CT clamp)
beheer.zoekPlaceholder: Search by name, abbreviation or power source...
beheer.bypassTitle: Bypasses itself and routes power straight through on overload
beheer.confirmKastVerwijderen: Delete this box? Boxes that were looped through it will automatically be linked to the box/generator above it.
beheer.confirmAllesWissen: Permanently delete all generators and boxes? This cannot be undone (export first if you want a backup).
rapport.chkGeneratorTotalen: Overview of generator totals per generator/group
rapport.duurHint: May take up to a minute for a large period/topology.
rapport.alertVulDatums: Enter a from and to date
rapport.alertGeenMeetdata: No measurement data found for this edition
rapport.pdfAlarmenTekst: No alert history available yet for this period. The alerting notification channel is still on the roadmap — once that's in place, this page will automatically fill with overruns per box/generator.
testdata.waarschuwing: Note: like the simulator, this tab is only meant to be available during the test phase and should be put behind the same --profile test flag afterwards.
testdata.eenvoudigPara: Simple — 3 generators, 11 boxes, 3 levels deep. Quick demo of how it works. This overwrites the current generators and boxes.
testdata.confirmEenvoudig: Load simple test topology? This overwrites the current generators and boxes.
testdata.alertEenvoudigGeladen: Simple test topology loaded. Go to "Manage" or "Calibrate" to continue.
testdata.uitgebreidPara: Extensive — 5 generators, 120 boxes, up to 10 levels deep per generator (a long distribution chain with side branches of sub-distributors/end boxes). For a stress test of the list, the diagram, the floor plan, the Sankey link and the Telegraf/InfluxDB/simulator throughput under realistic load. This overwrites the current generators and boxes.
testdata.confirmUitgebreid: Load extensive test topology (5 generators, 120 boxes, up to 10 levels deep)? This overwrites the current generators and boxes.
testdata.alertUitgebreidGeladen: Extensive test topology loaded (5 generators, 120 boxes). Go to "Manage", "Diagram" or "Calibrate" to continue.
testdata.simulatorPara: The simulator container always runs alongside, but only publishes fake measurement data once you explicitly start it here. Defaults to off again after every webapp restart.
testdata.meetdataWissenPara: Clears all measurement data (current/voltage/power) from InfluxDB — the topology (generators/boxes) stays intact. Useful for starting with a clean graph after a short test.
testdata.confirmWisMeetdata: Clear all measurement data in InfluxDB? The topology stays intact. This cannot be undone.
